name: Bryl Lim
title: Principal AI Engineer
bio: Bryl Lim is a Principal AI Engineer at Standard Chartered, a major banking institution headquartered in London, England. In this role, he focuses on leveraging artificial intelligence solutions to enhance the bank's operations and services. Standard Chartered is known for its global presence and commitment to innovation in the banking sector, particularly in integrating advanced technologies like AI and cloud computing to optimize processes and improve customer experiences. Bryl's extensive skill set includes expertise in software development, cloud computing, and agile methodologies, positioning him as a key player in the evolving landscape of banking technology. His previous experience includes roles at Cambridge University Press & Assessment and various IT companies, highlighting his strong background in both finance and technology.
